3232860.name: 奥ヶ淵商店街
3232860.description:
About the Game

Okugafuchi Shopping District is a single-player, first-person exploration horror game.

Story

Bound by the unreasonable orders of a powerful landowner, a timid real estate employee visits the abandoned Okugafuchi Shopping District—once the site of a series of bizarre suicides.

Tasked with performing a mysterious ritual for redevelopment, he wanders the empty streets according to cryptic instructions.

But a ghostly woman, forever searching for something, roams the ruins and interferes with the ritual. Through old documents and journals, the protagonist gradually uncovers the hidden legends and tragic past of Okugafuchi…

Setting

The environment was designed based on real-life abandoned shopping districts and ruins found across Japan.

Ruins Exploration Mode (For Non-Horror Players)

Like the previous game, this title includes a "Ruins Exploration Mode" for players who are not comfortable with horror elements.

  • Explore the ruins freely without any scares.

  • Change the time of day to experience different atmospheres.

  • Use the in-game camera feature to take photos of the abandoned scenery.

Playtime

Estimated playtime: 2–3 hours.

Guidelines for Video, Streaming, and Image Sharing

Applies to both individuals and organizations:

  • You are free to stream or upload videos of the game, whether commercial or non-commercial.

  • All scenes in the game can be shared.

  • Please include the Steam store page URL in the video description.

  • Still images taken in the main game or Ruins Exploration Mode can be shared or edited for non-commercial use.

    • Using them in monetized video thumbnails is allowed.

  • Selling still images taken in the Ruins Exploration Mode is strictly prohibited.

  • Do not post to sites with inappropriate content or create misleading representations of the game.

  • Closed-access streams (e.g., members-only streams) are allowed.

    • We would love to hear your impressions, though it’s not mandatory.

  • When posting on social media, please use the hashtag #奥ヶ淵商店街.

  • A bonus "Gallery" will unlock after clearing the game. This is also streamable and shareable.

Note

This product is not compatible with the Steam Deck.
